'''''Ewoks'' 11''' is the eleventh issue of [[Star Wars: Ewoks (1985)|Marvel's ''Ewoks'']] series of comic books. It and was published under the [[Marvel Comics]] [[Star Comics]] imprint on [[September 30]], [[1986]] with a cover date of [[January]] 1987.

==Publisher's summary==
''Wicket and Teebo must rescue Princess Kneesaa, who has been shrunken by the Fleebogs in order to defeat the ra-lugg. Little does she know that she will continue to shrink unless Wicket and Teebo reach her in time!''
